finding_text: Written procedures are not followed for the cleaning and maintenance ofequipment, including utensils, used in the manufacture, processing, packing or holding ofa drug product.

finding_text: Buildings used in the manufacture, processing, packing, or holding ofa drug product do not have the suitable construction to facilitate cleaning, maintenance, and proper operations.

finding_text: There are no written procedures for production and process controls designed to assure that the drug products have the identity, strength, quality, and purity they purport or are represented to possess.

finding_text: DA're(S) Of INSPECTIO~ 8/24/2015-9/17/2015* FEINUM8ER 3011286349 STREET AOCRESS 14844 Bristol Park Blvd TVPEESTAill.tSl-IMENI INSPC-cTEO Outsourcing Facility Drug product containers and closures were not clean and sterilized and processed to remove pyrogenic properties to assure that they are suitable for their intended use.

finding_text: Procedttres designed to prevent objectionable microorganisms in drug products not required to be sterile are not established, written, and followed.

finding_text: Equipment for adequate control over air pressure and micro-organisms is not provided when appropriate for the manufacture, processing, packing or holding of a drug product.

finding_text_ko: 노출된 식품 위에 매달린 안전형 조명기구가 제공되지 않았다.

finding_text: Each batch of drug product required to be free of objectionable microorganisms is not tested through appropriate laboratory testing.
finding_text_ko: 유해 미생물이 없어야 하는 각 의약품 배치(batch)에 대해 적절한 실험실 시험이 수행되지 않았다.

finding_text: There is a failure to thoroughly review the failure of a batch or any of its components to meet any of its specifications whether or not the batch has been already distributed.
finding_text_ko: 배치(batch) 또는 그 구성성분이 규격에 부합하지 못한 경우에 대해, 해당 배치가 이미 출하되었는지 여부와 관계없이 철저한 검토가 이루어지지 않았다.

finding_text: There is a failure to thoroughly review any unexplained discrepancy and the failure of a batch or any of its components to meet any of its specifications whether or not the batch has been already distributed.
finding_text_ko: 배치(batch) 또는 그 구성성분이 규격에 부합하지 못한 경우와 원인 불명의 불일치에 대해, 해당 배치가 이미 출하되었는지 여부와 관계없이 철저한 검토가 이루어지지 않았다.

finding_text: The responsibilities and procedures applicable to the quality control unit are not fully followed.
finding_text_ko: 품질관리부서에 적용되는 책임과 절차가 완전히 준수되지 않았다.

finding_text: Aseptic processing areas are deficient regarding the system for monitoring environmental conditions.
finding_text_ko: aseptic processing area(무균 공정 구역)는 환경 조건 모니터링 시스템이 미흡했다.

finding_text: Written records of investigations into unexplained discrepancies do not always include the conclusions and follow-up.
finding_text_ko: 원인 불명의 불일치에 대한 조사 기록에 결론 및 후속조치가 항상 포함되지는 않았다.

finding_text: Equipment and utensils are not cleaned, maintained.
finding_text_ko: 장비와 기구가 세척 및 유지관리되지 않았다.

finding_text: Procedures designed to prevent microbiological contamination ofdrug products purporting to be sterile are not written and followed.

finding_text: Procedures designed to prevent microbiological contamination of drug products purporting to be sterile do not include adequate validation of the sterilization process.
finding_text_ko: 무균으로 표방되는 의약품의 미생물 오염을 방지하도록 설계된 절차에 멸균 공정의 적절한 validation(밸리데이션)이 포함되지 않았다.

finding_text: There is no written testing program designed to assess the stability characteristics ofdrug products.

finding_text: Aseptic processing areas are deficient regarding systems for maintaining any equipment used to control the aseptic conditions.

finding_text: Separate or defined areas to prevent contamination or mix-ups are deficient regarding the manufacturing and processing operations .

finding_text: Procedures for device history records have not been established.

finding_text: Procedures designed to prevent microbiological contamination ofdrug products purporting to be sterile are not established, written, and followed.

finding_text: Time limits are not established when appropriate for the completion ofeach production phase to assure the quality ofthe drug product.

finding_text: Protective apparel is not worn as necessary to protect drug products from contamination.

finding_text: Each lot of a component that is liable to microbiological contamination that is objectionable in view of its intended use is not subjected to microbiological tests before use.

finding_text: Each batch of drug product purporting to be sterile and pyrogen-free is not laboratory tested to determine conformance to Each batch of drug product purporting to be sterile and pyrogen-free is not laboratory tested to determine conformance to Specifically, finished product certificates of analysis from your contract laboratory reference Sterility and Bacterial Endotoxin USP <85> tests.

finding_text: Lack of an automatic temperature alarm system for each freezer and cold storage compartment used to store food capable of supporting the growth of microorganisms.

finding_text: Routine calibration, inspection and checking of equipment is not performed according to a written program designed to assure proper performance.

finding_text: The separate or defined areas and control systems necessary to prevent contamination or mix-ups are deficient.

finding_text: Suitable outer garments are not worn that protect against contamination of food, food contact surfaces, and food packaging materials.

finding_text: The responsibilities and procedures applicable to the quality control unit are not fully followed.

finding_text: Equipment and utensils are not cleaned and maintained at appropriate intervals to prevent contamination that would alter the safety, identity, strength, quality or purity ofthe drug product.

finding_text: 1Y our firm continued producing sterile drug products while construction was ongoing within your facility without establishing adequate controls to prevent contamination of the production environment.

finding_text: Testing and release of drug product for distribution do not include appropriate laboratory determination of satisfactory conformance to the final specifications and identity and strength of each active ingredient prior to release.
finding_text_ko: 출하 전 의약품의 시험 및 출하승인에는 최종 규격과 각 활성성분의 확인 및 함량에 대한 적합성을 확인하는 적절한 실험실 판정이 포함되지 않았다.

finding_text: (a).Your firm failed to thoroughly investigate the QREs (Quality Related Events) for Epinephrine 1: 1000 PF Sulfite Free Injectable lots 20121018@9 and 20121024@8 and dispensed from 11/2-11/7/12 with reported pink discoloration, which resulted in the recall of both lots.
finding_text_ko: (a). 업체는 Epinephrine 1:1000 PF Sulfite Free Injectable lots 20121018@9 및 20121024@8에 대한 QREs(Quality Related Events)를 철저히 조사하지 않았으며, 해당 lots는 11/2-11/7/12에 조제되었고 분홍색 변색 보고로 두 lots 모두 회수되었다.

finding_text: There is no written testing program designed to assess the stability characteristics of drug products.

finding_text: Procedures designed to prevent microbiological contamination of drug products purporting to be sterile are not established and followed.

finding_text: were There is no formal test method for sterility testing for all products, except for lyophilized products which include HCG and Sermorelin-GHRP-6 (all formulations).

finding_text: The operations relating to the processing and packing of penicillin are not performed in facilities separate from those used for other drug products for human use.
finding_text_ko: 페니실린 가공 및 포장 관련 작업이 인체용 다른 의약품에 사용되는 시설과 분리된 시설에서 수행되지 않았다.

finding_text: Specifically, according to your firm’s “Sterile compounding standards operating procedures”, updated 10/10/2015, under REDACTED B4”, a REDACTED B4.

finding_text: Aseptic processing areas are deficient regarding the system for cleaning and disinfecting the room and equipment to produce aseptic conditions.
finding_text_ko: aseptic processing area(무균 공정 구역)는 무균 조건을 만들기 위한 작업실 및 장비의 세척·소독 시스템이 미흡했다.

finding_text: Investigations of an unexplained discrepancy and a failure of a batch or any of its components to meet any of its specifications did not extend to other drug products that may have been associated with the specific failure or discrepancy.
finding_text_ko: 원인 불명의 불일치와 배치(batch) 또는 그 구성성분의 규격 부적합에 대한 조사가 특정 실패 또는 불일치와 관련되었을 수 있는 다른 의약품으로 확대되지 않았다.

finding_text: Acceptance criteria for the sampling and testing conducted by the quality control unit is not adequate to assure that batches of drug products meet each appropriate specification as a condition for their approval and release.
finding_text_ko: 품질관리부서가 수행한 검체채취 및 시험의 허용기준이 의약품 배치(batch)가 승인 및 출하 조건으로 각 적절한 규격에 부합함을 보장하기에 적절하지 않았다.

finding_text: Failure to take necessary precautions to protect against contamination of food and food contact surfaces with microorganisms and foreign substances.
finding_text_ko: 미생물 및 이물질에 의한 식품 및 식품 접촉 표면 오염을 방지하기 위한 필요한 예방조치를 취하지 않았다.

finding_text: Procedures designed to prevent microbiological contamination of drug products purporting to be sterile are not followed.
finding_text_ko: 무균으로 표방되는 의약품의 미생물 오염을 방지하도록 설계된 절차가 준수되지 않았다.

finding_text: Reports of analysis from component suppliers are accepted in lieu of testing each component for conformity with all appropriate written specifications, without performing at least one specific identity test on each component and establishing the reliability of the supplier's analyses through appropliate validation of the supplier's test results at appropriate intervals.
finding_text_ko: 원자재 공급업체의 분석 보고서가, 각 원자재에 대해 최소 1개의 특정 확인시험을 수행하지 않고 적절한 간격으로 공급업체 시험 결과를 적절히 validation(밸리데이션)하여 분석 신뢰성을 확립하지 않은 채, 각 원자재가 모든 적절한 서면 규격에 부합하는지 시험하는 것을 대신해 수용되었다.

finding_text: The ISO-classified areas have difficult to clean, particle-generating, or visibly dirty equipment.
finding_text_ko: ISO 등급 구역에는 세척이 어렵고 입자를 발생시키거나 육안으로 더러운 장비가 있었다.

finding_text: The responsibilities and procedures applicable to the quality control unit are not in writing and fully followed.
finding_text_ko: 품질관리부서에 적용되는 책임과 절차가 문서화되어 있지 않았고 완전히 준수되지 않았다.

finding_text: There is a failure to thoroughly review any unexplained discrepancy and the failure ofa batch or any of its components to meet any of its specificat ions whether or not the batch has been already distributed.
finding_text_ko: 배치(batch) 또는 그 구성성분이 규격에 부합하지 못한 경우와 원인 불명의 불일치에 대해, 해당 배치가 이미 출하되었는지 여부와 관계없이 철저한 검토가 이루어지지 않았다.

finding_text: Aseptic processing areas are deficient regarding the system for monitoring environmental conditions.
finding_text_ko: aseptic processing area(무균 공정 구역)는 환경 조건 모니터링 시스템이 미흡했다.

finding_text: The written stability program for drug products does not include reliable, meaningful, and specific test methods.
finding_text_ko: 의약품에 대한 서면 안정성 프로그램에 신뢰성 있고 의미 있으며 구체적인 시험방법이 포함되지 않았다.

finding_text: Time lin1its are not established when appropriate for the completion of each production phase to assure the quality of the drug product.
finding_text_ko: 의약품 품질을 보장하기 위해 각 생산 단계 완료에 적절한 시간 제한이 설정되지 않았다.

finding_text: DE P ARTM ENT OF HEALTH AND HUMAi'l SE RVIC E S DISTRICT ADDRESS AND PHONE NUMBER OATE(S) OF INSPECTION 2221 5 26th Ave SE Su ite 21 0 1 2/8/201 5 - 4/ 1 5/201 6* (425)302- 0340 Fax : (425)302- 0404 NAME AND TI'TLE OF INDIVIDUAL TO WHOM REPORT ISSUED Katerie D.
finding_text_ko: DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES, OATE(S) OF INSPECTION 12/8/2015 - 4/15/2016*, 22215 26th Ave SE Suite 210, (425)302-0340, Katerie D. 관련 점검 보고서 헤더 정보가 기록되었다.

finding_text: Each batch of drug product purporting to be sterile and pyrogen-free is not laboratory tested to determine conformance to such requirements.
finding_text_ko: 무균으로 표방되고 pyrogen-free로 표방되는 각 의약품 배치(batch)에 대해 해당 요건 적합성을 확인하는 실험실 시험이 수행되지 않았다.
